arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds have 'question marks' over Premier League left-back as 'concrete' target emerges
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly having second thoughts over whether to sign Fulham left-back Antonee Robinson this summer.

arts.ttl: Peter Schmeichel leaves Alisson stunned live on TV after Liverpool heroics against PSG
arts.sum: Alisson Becker produced a man of the match performance for Liverpool against PSG

arts.ttl: 'Surely': Rio Ferdinand says Liverpool's win vs PSG showed Arsenal exactly the kind of player they're missing
Liverpool fans told Alisson WILL LEAVE in the summer as Arne Slot faces huge blow
arts.sum: Liverpool goalkeeper Alisson has been playing some of the best football of his career this season but the Brazil international has been tipped to leave in the summer

arts.ttl: Liverpool fan added to EA FC 25 – here's how you can be added to the game next
arts.sum: A new SuperFans campaign in EA FC 25 will see a die-hard Liverpool fan immortalised in-game, located in the home stands of Anfield.

arts.ttl: What Nuno Mendes said when asked about joining Man Utd in 2020 after PSG star pockets Mohamed Salah in Paris
'I played with Virgil van Dijk and marked Lionel Messi - now I'm in League One'
arts.sum: Wrexham defender Eoghan O'Connell enjoyed a star studded beginning to his career at Celtic after featuring alongside Virgil van Dijk and marking Lionel Messi against Barcelona

arts.ttl: Liverpool target Bournemouth's Kerkez - Thursday's gossip
arts.sum: Liverpool target Milos Kerkez, West Ham are trying to sign Angel Gomes, Manchester United consider James Trafford and Joan Garcia, plus more.

arts.ttl: Liverpool XI vs Southampton: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup and injury latest for Premier League
arts.sum: Arne Slot will hope to have key attacker available again

arts.ttl: One transfer to help Madrid, Barcelona, Arsenal & Liverpool win the Champions League
arts.sum: One transfer to help Madrid, Barcelona, Arsenal & Liverpool win the Champions League Liverpool may well sign Kerkez in the summer, but they would love to be able to snag him now because he would give the left side of their defence a boost at both ends of the pitch, much in the way Robertson did when he broke into the team all those years ago.
